fixedIssues.description: CatalogItemRequest listed unitOfMeasure, hsnCode, and gstRate as (optional) but source code shows @NotBlank/@NotNull — they are required. Fixed: updated field optionality to (required) with validation annotation notes.
CatalogItemDto response field names were wrong (productName→name, skuCode→code, defaultColour→color, sizeLabel→size). Fixed: updated to match actual record field names.

Readiness blocker table used wildcard *_ACCOUNT_MISSING instead of listing the four specific FINISHED_GOOD account blocker codes. Fixed: replaced wildcard with explicit enumeration of FINISHED_GOOD_VALUATION_ACCOUNT_MISSING, FINISHED_GOOD_COGS_ACCOUNT_MISSING, FINISHED_GOOD_REVENUE_ACCOUNT_MISSING, FINISHED_GOOD_TAX_ACCOUNT_MISSING plus RAW_MATERIAL_INVENTORY_ACCOUNT_MISSING, RAW_MATERIAL_CATEGORY_REQUIRED, FINISHED_GOOD_CATEGORY_REQUIRED.

skuCode immutability description was imprecise — implied runtime guard but actual immutability is structural (field absent from update DTO). Fixed: clarified that skuCode is structurally immutable by omission.

rejectedObservations.observation: Worker transcript showed garbled/corrupted assistant text in ~20+ tool calls before session recovered.
rejectedObservations.reason: Transcript quality observation with no impact on deliverable quality. No actionable fix needed for docs/governance.
